name: Troy
notes: City at the centre of the Trojan War tradition

name: Thebes
notes: City linked to Oedipus Dionysus and Heracles

name: Athens
notes: City associated with Athena Theseus and many myths

name: Sparta
notes: Home of Menelaus and Helen in mythic tradition

name: Crete
notes: Island of Minos Ariadne and the Minotaur

name: Knossos
notes: Palace associated with Minos and the Labyrinth

name: Colchis
notes: Destination of Jason and the Argonauts

name: Calydon
notes: Site of the Calydonian Boar hunt

name: Arcadia
notes: Associated with Pan and pastoral myth

name: Eleusis
notes: Linked to Demeter Persephone and the Eleusinian Mysteries

name: Tartarus
notes: Deep abyss used as prison or place of punishment

name: Aulis
notes: Greek fleet gathering point before Troy

name: Lesbos
notes: Associated with lyric poetry and mythic references

name: Ionia
notes: Traditional region associated with Homeric poetry

name: Mount Parnassus
notes: Associated with Apollo Dionysus and the Muses

name: Cephalonia
notes: Linked to western Greek heroic geography

name: Aiaia
notes: Island of Circe in the Odyssey

name: Ogygia
notes: Island of Calypso in the Odyssey

name: Ismarus
notes: Odysseus raids the Cicones after Troy

name: Cyclopes Island
notes: Land of Polyphemus in the Odyssey

name: Thrace
notes: Region linked to Orpheus Dionysus and several myths
